title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Lodha & Co

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Lodha & Co
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!
